name: - Girls Und Panzer - RPG
description:
WELCOME

Girls und Panzer is set in an alternate universe where a sport known as "Panzerfahren" or "Sensha-do" - the art of fighting tanks, or tankery, is a lot more common than today. The sport is entirely practiced by girls and women and is considered feminine. The anime series follows the girls of Ooarai Girls Academy as they learn about, operate, and battle with all kinds of WWII tanks against other tanking schools while forming bonds with their machines and each other.

_________________________________________________________________________________________________

In this scenario you have to choose a school or either be a singular student of an Unknown school using any Tank you can use.
Tank Year Limit (1917-1950) None Any above but you're probably gonna break the rules and yeah I Can't do nothing about it. But you can do Anything here. So welcome.

Versions -
BETA - 04/15/25
Release of AI. Testing.

Version 0.5 - 04/16/25
Added Characters and Commanders.
Small Remodel of Chat
Added 1 New School.

NOTES -
If the AI speaks about you're character It is not my fault it is the Janitor AI BETA or Proxy's BOT.
All characters are 18+
Nothing Else Just us Panzers


OTHER BOTS
Ooarai School - In development unreleased.
